title: Project the registry into a region of CLAUDE.md
description:
Region projection already exists: `project_invariants` switches `ProjectionMode::{SeparateFile, Region}`; region mode uses `splice_region` (validation/projection.rs:167) to replace only bytes between begin/end markers, atomic write-back through storage, raising a typed `ProjectionError` (never clobbering) on missing/malformed markers. Config `InvariantProjectionConfig` owns target/mode/markers (config.rs:578/596/614).

Scope: insert begin/end region markers around the `### Domain Invariants` section of `CLAUDE.md` (line 123) and set `[invariant_projection]` `target=CLAUDE.md`, `mode=region`, reusing the existing region projection. No new engine code is strictly required. The rendered registry output replaces the hand-authored prose (intended dedup). The CLAUDE.md write goes through the storage-backed projection (`write_repo_file`), not `std::fs`.

## Success Criteria
- [hard] REQ-06: With region markers in place and `mode=region`, `target=CLAUDE.md`, projection replaces only the marked region from the registry (the `### Domain Invariants` section becomes a projection of the registry), and malformed or missing markers raise a typed `ProjectionError` without clobbering the file.
